title: Customer Panel Modifications: Remove History, Disable Auto-Scroll, Simplify Ticket Payment

requirements.summary: Remove the chat/ticket history section (ServiceHistoryTimeline and any related 'History' tab) from the CustomerDashboard and ClientPortal entirely
acceptanceCriteria: No 'History' or 'Service History' tab is visible in the CustomerDashboard or ClientPortal.
ServiceHistoryTimeline component is not rendered anywhere in the customer-facing flow.
Removing the tab does not break any other functionality.

file_operations.description: Remove any tab or reference to ServiceHistoryTimeline or history-related views from the customer dashboard tab structure. Ensure the remaining tabs (Client Portal, Chat, Knowledge Base, Payment) continue to render correctly.
Remove the 'Service History' tab and its associated TabsContent section that renders ServiceHistoryTimeline. Keep only the 'My Tickets' and 'Support Plans' tabs functional.

requirements.summary: Disable any automatic scroll-to-top behavior on both the CustomerDashboard and ExpertDashboard panels when switching tabs or navigating within these dashboards
acceptanceCriteria: Switching tabs in CustomerDashboard does not scroll the page/panel to the top.
Switching tabs in ExpertDashboard does not scroll the page/panel to the top.
No window.scrollTo, element.scrollTop, or similar auto-scroll calls are triggered on tab changes in either dashboard.

file_operations.description: Locate and remove or comment out any useEffect hooks, onValueChange handlers, or other logic that triggers window.scrollTo, scrollIntoView, or manual scrollTop modifications when the active tab changes. Preserve all other tab-switching functionality.

Locate and remove or comment out any useEffect hooks, onValueChange handlers, or other logic that triggers window.scrollTo, scrollIntoView, or manual scrollTop modifications when the active tab changes. Preserve all other tab-switching functionality.

requirements.summary: Remove the full payment requirement that blocks ticket creation in TicketCreationForm. Replace it with a minimum fixed charge of $1 USD. The ticket creation flow should proceed after a $1 charge is processed, not the full session payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Customers can create a ticket after a $1 fixed charge without being blocked by a full payment requirement.
TicketCreationForm no longer presents or enforces a full payment flow before ticket submission.
The $1 minimum charge is clearly communicated to the customer in the ticket creation UI.
Backend ticket creation logic does not require full payment validation to proceed.
Chat remains disabled for customers (no change to that behavior).

file_operations.description: Replace any full-payment-required logic with a $1 fixed charge flow. Update the UI to clearly indicate the $1 minimum charge. Remove or bypass any code that blocks ticket submission until full payment is completed. Ensure the form calls createSupportCheckoutSession with a $1 amount, then proceeds to ticket creation after Stripe redirects to the success URL. Keep chat disabled for customers as per existing constraints.
